services.name: Cut & style
services.description: Precision cuts for all hair types

faqs.question: Do you take walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We're appointment-based, but we're happy to fit you in same-day if a slot opens up.

faqs.question: How much is a color?
faqs.answer: It depends on hair length and the look you want — a stylist can quote you exactly when you book.

faqs.question: Can I request a specific stylist?
faqs.answer: Of course — just let us know who you'd like to book with.

promotion.headline: 20% off first-time color appointments
promotion.details: New clients get 20% off their first color or balayage service this month.
